# netbox_vrf (Resource)

Manages a NetBox VRF (Virtual Routing and Forwarding) instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a VRF with route distinguisher
resource "netbox_vrf" "example" {
  name        = "example-vrf"
  rd          = "65000:100"
  description = "Example VRF"
  tenant      = netbox_tenant.example.id

  tags = [
    {
      name = "production"
      slug = "production"
    }
  ]
}

# VRF with enforce_unique - prevents duplicate IP addresses within this VRF
resource "netbox_vrf" "unique" {
  name           = "unique-vrf"
  rd             = "65000:200"
  enforce_unique = true
  description    = "VRF with IP uniqueness enforcement"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the VRF.

### Optional

- `comments` (String) Additional comments.
- `description` (String) Description of the VRF.
- `enforce_unique` (Boolean) If true, prevent duplicate prefixes/IPs in this VRF.
- `rd` (String) Route distinguisher (RD) for the VRF.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this VRF. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `tenant` (Number) Tenant ID that owns this VRF.
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing VRF with matching name instead of creating a new one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
